title: spec build capabilities resource (spec://current/capabilities)
description: Wire schema of the spec://current/capabilities MCP resource. It advertises which pluggable adapters are active so a BYO harness can adapt without probing. Additive within build-port/v1.

finishingTools.description: Finishing tool names the active strategy exposes (subset of spec_push, spec_open_pr, spec_link_prs). Empty for a local-only strategy.

completion.description: Human-readable description of how the active strategy defines build completion.
